title: Important Computer Facts & Super Computers – Page 489
section: Computer: Important Facts, Super Computers & Firsts

questions.question: December 2 is observed as:
questions.explanation: Page 489: December 2 is observed as Computer Literacy Day.

questions.question: India announced New Computer Policy in:
questions.explanation: Page 489: India has announced New Computer Policy in 1984.

questions.question: First computer made in India is:
questions.explanation: Page 489: First computer (made in India) is 'Siddharth', manufactured by Electronics Corporation of India.

questions.question: First computer in India was installed in the Main Post Office of Bangalore on:
questions.explanation: Page 489: First computer in India was installed in the Main Post Office of Bangalore on August 16, 1986.

questions.question: First Pollution Free Computerized Petrol Pump of India is in:
questions.explanation: Page 489: First Pollution Free Computerized Petrol Pump of India is in Mumbai.

questions.question: First Computer University (in Private Sector) in India is:
questions.explanation: Page 489: First Computer University (in Private Sector) in India is Rajeev Gandhi Computer University.

questions.question: Bangalore (now Bengaluru) is also known as the:
questions.explanation: Page 489: Bangalore (now Bengaluru) is also known as the Silicon Valley of India.

questions.question: First Indian News Paper to be available on Internet is:
questions.explanation: Page 489: First Indian News Paper to be available on Internet is 'The Hindu'.

questions.question: First Indian magazine to be available on Internet is:
questions.explanation: Page 489: First Indian magazine to be available on Internet is 'India Today'.

questions.question: First Indian political party which created its website on internet is:
questions.explanation: Page 489: First Indian political party which has created its website on internet is 'Bhartiya Janata Party (BJP)'.

questions.question: There are mainly three types of Computers:
questions.explanation: Page 489: Mainly there are three types of Computers — Digital, Analog and Hybrid.

questions.question: First Super Computer of the world is:
questions.explanation: Page 489: First Super Computer of the world is CRAY K-1-S, developed by Cray K Company of U.S.A.

questions.question: 'Deep Blue' is a Super Computer which had defeated World Chess Champion:
questions.explanation: Page 489: 'Deep Blue' is a Super Computer which had defeated World Chess Champion Garry Kasparov.

questions.question: Deep Blue is able to do work equivalent to how many computers?
questions.explanation: Page 489: Deep Blue is able to do the work equivalent to 32 computers and can think 20 crore steps of chess in 1 second.

questions.question: Seymour Cray is called the Father of:
questions.explanation: Page 489: Seymour Cray is called the Father of Super Computer.

questions.question: CRAY KIS super computer was manufactured by:
questions.explanation: Page 489: CRAY KIS manufactured by CRAY K Research Co., USA.

questions.question: Deep Blue and Blue Gene were manufactured by:
questions.explanation: Page 489: Deep Blue and Blue Gene manufactured by IBM Co., USA.

questions.question: COSMOS super computer was developed by:
questions.explanation: Page 489: COSMOS developed by Cambridge University, UK.

questions.question: First Electronic Digital Computer of the world is:
questions.explanation: Page 489: First Electronic Digital Computer of the world is 'ENIAC'.

questions.question: Most popular Operating System in smartphones is:
questions.explanation: Page 489: Most popular OS: in PC—Windows, in smartphones—Android, in Tablets—iOS. Android is used in highest number of devices across the world.

questions.question: Most Super Computers use which operating system?
questions.explanation: Page 489: Most Super Computers use Linux.

questions.question: USENET is a link to connect all the:
questions.explanation: Page 489: USENET is a link to connect all the universities.

questions.question: First book on Personal Computer was written by:
questions.explanation: Page 489: First book on Personal Computer was written by Ted Nelson. The book 'Soul of New Machine' won Pulitzer Prize.

questions.question: First magazine on Computer is:
questions.explanation: Page 489: First magazine on Computer is 'Computer and Automotion'.

questions.question: First home Computer is:
questions.explanation: Page 489: First home Computer is Comodor VIC / 20.

questions.question: First Practical Digital computer is:
questions.explanation: Page 489: First Practical Digital computer is UNIVAC.

questions.question: FORTRAN is the first:
questions.explanation: Page 489: FORTRAN is the first Programming Language.

questions.question: PROLOG is the language of the:
questions.explanation: Page 489: PROLOG is the language of the fifth generation of computer.

questions.question: J.S. Kilbi developed the:
questions.explanation: Page 489: J.S. Kilbi developed the IC chips.

questions.question: A computer error is known as:
questions.explanation: Page 489: A computer error is known as Bug.

questions.question: C-DAC (Centre for Development and Advanced Computing) was established in Pune in:
questions.explanation: Page 489: C-DAC was established in Pune in 1988.

questions.question: FLO SOLVER super computer was developed by:
questions.explanation: Page 489: FLO SOLVER developed by NAL, Bangalore.

questions.question: PACE super computer was developed by:
questions.explanation: Page 489: PACE developed by DRDO.

questions.question: PARAM-10000 super computer was developed by:
questions.explanation: Page 489: PARAM-10000 developed by C-DAC, Pune.

questions.question: Super computer PARAM-10000 has the capacity of 1 billion calculations per second. The main credit goes to:

options.B: Dr. Vijay P. Bhaskar, Executive Director of C-DAC, Pune

questions.explanation: Page 489: PARAM-10000 was made on March 28, 1998. Main credit goes to Dr. Vijay P. Bhaskar, Executive Director of C-DAC, Pune.

questions.question: PARAM KAMRUPA Super Computer facility was inaugurated at IIT Guahati on:
questions.explanation: Page 489: PARAM KAMRUPA was inaugurated by President Droupadi Murmu at IIT Guahati on Oct. 13, 2022.

questions.question: National Aeronautics Laboratories, Bangalore was the first in India to develop a Super Computer named:
questions.explanation: Page 489: National Aeronautics Laboratories, Bangalore was the first in India to develop a Super Computer named FLO SOLVER.

questions.question: Laser Printers are the:
questions.explanation: Page 489: Laser Printers are the fastest printers.

questions.question: IBM stands for:
questions.explanation: Page 489: IBM (International Business Machine) is an American computer company.

questions.question: Computer virus is a man made digital parasite which corrupts the file and is known as:
questions.explanation: Page 489: Computer virus is a man made digital parasite which corrupts (infects) the file and known as 'File corrupter'.

questions.question: Modem is a device which connects computers and works based on:
questions.explanation: Page 489: Modem is a device which connects the computers and works based on telephone lines.

questions.question: Y-2K was a technical problem associated with the calendar known as:
questions.explanation: Page 489: Y-2K was a technical problem associated with the calendar (Date, Month and Year) known as 'Millenium Bug'.

questions.question: The development of computer started in India since:
questions.explanation: Page 489: The development of computer started in India since 1955.

questions.question: Indian Institute of Science, Bangalore has developed a small palm sized touch screen computer called:
questions.explanation: Page 489: Indian Institute of Science, Bangalore has developed 'Simputer', a small palm sized touch screen computer.

questions.question: First computerarium in India is in:
questions.explanation: Page 489: First computerarium in India is in Bangaluru (Karnataka).

questions.question: Vellanad of Thiruvananthapuram district in Kerala has been declared the first fully computerised village of:
questions.explanation: Page 489: Vellanad of Thiruvananthapuram district in Kerala has been declared the first fully computerised village of India.

questions.question: Linus Benedict Torvalds, creator of Unix like Operating System (Linux), was born in Helsinki, Finland on:
questions.explanation: Page 489: Linus Benedict Torvalds was born in Helsinki, Finland on December 28, 1969.

questions.question: On Sept. 17, 1991, Linus completed the first version of:
questions.explanation: Page 489: On Sept. 17, 1991, Linus completed the first version of Linux. He released it under General Public Licence.

questions.question: CHIPP-16 super computer was developed by:
questions.explanation: Page 489: CHIPP-16 developed by C-Dot, Bangalore.

questions.question: MULTIMICRO and MACH super computers were developed in:
questions.explanation: Page 489: MULTIMICRO by IIS, Bangalore. MACH by IIT, Bombay.
